name: SparkplugPanel
description: Sparkplug session tree: host state strip, virtualized group/node/device/metric tree with health meta, pinned warnings strip.

props.name: treeState
props.description: SparkplugTreeState snapshot from the sparkplug tree store (plain state in, so stories can feed fixtures).

props.name: width
props.description: Panel width for the virtual-list row max-width math.

props.name: filter
props.description: Case-insensitive substring filter on node/device/metric names.

props.name: onRequestRebirth
props.description: (group, node) callback for the Request rebirth actions.

props.name: onCopyMetricList
props.description: (node) callback for the Copy metric list action.

notes: Figma is not linked yet; stories use local fixtures. Expansion state is panel-local (everything defaults expanded).
